# the-way — Copilot instructions

This file is intentionally thin. The single source of truth for `the-way` — its
contract, lifecycle, layout, conventions, and agent guidance — lives in
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root.

**Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) first.** It is tool-agnostic and canonical.
Everything you need to work in this repo is there, including:

- the eight-promise contract,
- the idea → proposal → decision → plan → execution lifecycle and where each
  artifact lives,
- the cross-link vocabulary,
- the confirmation guard.

Do not duplicate that content here; keep this file a pointer so the two never
diverge (Economy, promise #2).
